import logging
from typing import Any, Dict
from opentelemetry import trace

logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)

def process_payment(order_id: int, amount: float, user_id: int) -> dict:
    span = trace.get_current_span()
    span.set_attribute("user_id", user_id)
    span.set_attribute("order_id", order_id)
    span.set_attribute("amount", amount)

    logger.info(f"Processing payment for user {user_id}, order {order_id}")

    result = _charge_card(amount)

    span.set_attribute("transaction_id", result["transaction_id"])
    logger.info(f"Payment completed: {result['transaction_id']}")

    return result

def _charge_card(amount: float) -> dict:
    return {"transaction_id": "txn_123", "status": "success"}

def refund_payment(order_id: int, amount: float, user_id: int) -> dict:
    span = trace.get_current_span()
    span.set_attribute("user_id", user_id)
    span.set_attribute("order_id", order_id)
    span.set_attribute("amount", amount)

    logger.info(f"Processing refund for user {user_id}, order {order_id}")

    result = _issue_refund(amount)

    span.set_attribute("refund_id", result["refund_id"])
    logger.info(f"Refund completed: {result['refund_id']}")

    return result

def _issue_refund(amount: float) -> dict:
    return {"refund_id": "ref_456", "status": "success"}
